title: hieracium kemiticum
side_effects: Hieracium kemiticum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds may cause liver damage and kidney failure in severe cases. Additionally, improper use can also lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory issues.
